mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NMCP_RATE_BAS ( CD_GROUP_ID1, RATE_CONTENT, RATE_TITLE, CRET_ID, CRET_DT, RATE_MOBILE_CONTENT ) VALUES ( #{cdGroupId1}, #{rateContent}, #{rateTitle}, #{cretId}, SYSDATE, #{rateMobileContent} )
mapper.select: SELECT CD_GROUP_ID1, RATE_TITLE, RATE_CONTENT, CRET_ID, CRET_DT, AMD_ID, AMD_DT, RATE_MOBILE_CONTENT FROM NMCP_RATE_BAS WHERE CD_GROUP_ID1 = #{seq}
mapper.update: UPDATE NMCP_RATE_BAS SET RATE_TITLE = #{rateTitle}, RATE_CONTENT = #{rateContent}, AMD_ID = #{amdId}, AMD_DT = SYSDATE, RATE_MOBILE_CONTENT = #{rateMobileContent} WHERE CD_GROUP_ID1 = #{seq}
mapper.select: SELECT CONT_SEQ FROM NMCP_CONT_RATE_ADDITION WHERE SOC_CODE = #{socCode} AND ROWNUM=1
